title: Menu
description:
Starbucks offers you delicious handcrafted beverages and great tasting snacks made from high quality ingredients. Coffee is our first passion, and so is everything we do to make your Starbucks experience enjoyable wherever you are.

Whether you want a signature coffee drink or a light meal, Starbucks is your favorite destination to start your day perfectly every day.

drinks.title: Explore Beverages
drinks.description: Enjoy the wonderful world of signature Starbucks drinks, refreshing hot or cold beverages with a rich flavor.

caffe-latte.title: Caffe Latte
caffe-latte.description: Our dark, rich espresso balanced with steamed milk and a light layer of foam.

food.title: Explore Food
food.description: Starbucks offers you a wide selection of sandwiches, salads or desserts to suit all tastes.

halloumi.title: Arabic Style Halloumi Panini
halloumi.description: Grilled halloumi with herbs, prepared Arabic style with grilled halloumi cheese, dried tomatoes and black olive paste.

allergyInfo.title: Allergens
allergyInfo.description: Please be advised that we cannot confirm that our food or drinks are completely free of allergenic ingredients result of handle with common equipment in our cafes.
